evals.name: Application OutOfSync and Degraded
evals.prompt: My Application podinfo in the apps namespace is showing OutOfSync and Degraded. Debug it.
expectations: Retrieves the Application resource and shows its sync and health status
Identifies the sync status as OutOfSync and health as Degraded
Checks status conditions for errors (ComparisonError, SyncError)
Checks operation state for last sync result and error messages
Identifies which resources are out of sync or unhealthy
Inspects the unhealthy managed resources (Deployments, Pods)
Checks pod logs or events for failing containers
Produces a report with root cause and recommendations

evals.name: Canary Rollout stuck at step 2
evals.prompt: The canary rollout for frontend in production namespace is stuck at step 2. Figure out why.
expectations: Retrieves the Rollout and identifies its current phase
Identifies the current step index and what step 2 is
Checks pause conditions (manual pause vs analysis-driven)
Inspects associated AnalysisRuns if analysis is involved
Checks metric results and measurements in the AnalysisRun
Inspects traffic routing configuration if configured
Compares stable vs canary ReplicaSets and pod status
Produces a report with root cause and recommendations

evals.name: Argo CD installation health check
evals.prompt: Check if Argo CD is properly installed on my cluster and report the status.
expectations: Checks for argoproj.io CRDs on the cluster
Identifies the Argo CD namespace (argocd or openshift-gitops)
Lists pods and their status in the Argo CD namespace
Checks core component health (server, repo-server, application-controller)
Reports the Argo CD version
Inspects configuration (argocd-cm or ArgoCD CR)
Reports any unhealthy components with diagnostic details
Produces a structured status report

evals.name: Workflow build-pipeline failing
evals.prompt: My Argo Workflow build-pipeline in the argo namespace keeps failing at the docker-build step. Debug it.
expectations: Retrieves the Workflow and identifies its phase as Failed
Identifies the failed node (docker-build) from status.nodes
Gets logs for the failed pod
Checks for common failure patterns (OOMKilled, ImagePullBackOff, permission denied)
Checks resource limits on the docker-build template
Checks ServiceAccount permissions
Produces a report with root cause and recommendations

evals.name: EventSource not receiving events
evals.prompt: The EventSource github-webhook in the events namespace isn't receiving events. Debug it.
expectations: Retrieves the EventSource and checks its status conditions
Verifies the EventBus exists and its pods are running
Checks EventSource pod status and logs
Checks if the webhook Service/Ingress/Route is configured
Checks associated Sensor status
Analyzes connectivity (webhook reachable, firewall, DNS)
Produces a report with root cause and recommendations
